--- ### ALL PAGES ### layout: themes/classy/admin/core/minimal ### THEME CONFIG ### theme: header: title: content: "Dashboard" icon: "gauge-high" breadcrumbs: items: - label: "Admin" href: "/admin" - label: "Dashboard" ### REGULAR PAGES ### meta: title: "Dashboard - Admin" description: "Admin dashboard overview and statistics" breadcrumb: "Dashboard" prerender_icons: - name: "users" - name: "user-plus" - name: "credit-card" - name: "bell" - name: "user" - name: "circle" ---
